zh.Kappel am Albis, Affoltern, Zürich, Suis: 瑞士爾利爾利阿福爾泰
zh.lifeSummary: 當Baron Walter I von Eschenbach於大約1150年出生在瑞士盧爾埃申巴赫時，他的父親Walter I. von Eschenbach26歲，母親Adelheid von Geroldseck37歲。他和Adelheid von Schwarzenberg至少有1個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1187年6月1日在瑞士爾利爾利阿福爾泰享年38歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Baron Walter I von Eschenbach于大约1150年出生在瑞士盧爾埃申巴赫时，他的父亲Walter I. von Eschenbach26岁，母亲Adelheid von Geroldseck37岁。他和Adelheid von Schwarzenberg至少有1个儿子和2个女儿。他去世于1187年6月1日在瑞士爾利爾利阿福爾泰享年38岁。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Eschenbach
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: habitational name from any of several places so named.

variants.name: Eschenbacher
meanings: German: habitational name for someone from any of various places called   Eschenbach  .

nameMeanings.name: Walter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, superseding the native Old English form, Wealdhere. It was a very popular name in medieval England, normally pronounced ‘Water’.

variants.name: Walther
meanings: from wald ‘rule’ + heri ‘army’; name of the famous medieval minnesinger Walther von der Vogelweide ( c.1170– c.1230 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Baron Walter I von Eschenbach was born about 1150, in Eschenbach, Lucerne, Switzerland, his father, Walter I. von Eschenbach, was 26 and his mother, Adelheid von Geroldseck, was 37. He had at least 1 son and 2 daughters with Adelheid von Schwarzenberg. He died on 1 June 1187, in Affoltern, Zürich, Zürich, Switzerland, at the age of 38.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Baron Walter I von Eschenbach est né environ 1150, à Eschenbach, Lucerne, Suisse, son père, Walter I. von Eschenbach, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Adelheid von Geroldseck, avait 37 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles avec Adelheid von Schwarzenberg. Il est décédé le 1 juin 1187, à Affoltern, Zürich, Zurich, Suisse, à l’âge de 38 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Baron Walter I von Eschenbach um 1150 in Eschenbach, Luzern, Schweiz geboren wurde, war sein Vater Walter I. von Eschenbach 26 und seine Mutter Adelheid von Geroldseck 37. Er hatte mit Adelheid von Schwarzenberg mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 1. Juni 1187 im Alter von 38 Jahren in Affoltern, Zürich, Zürich, Schweiz.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Baron Walter I von Eschenbach è nato il circa 1150 nel Eschenbach, Lucerna, Svizzera, il suo padre, Walter I. von Eschenbach, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Adelheid von Geroldseck, aveva 37 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie con Adelheid von Schwarzenberg. Morì il 1 giugno 1187, nel Affoltern, Zürich, Zurigo, Svizzera, all'età di 38 anni.

ko.Hausen, Hausen am Albis, Zürich, Suisse: 스위스 즈u리치 하우센 아 알비스 하우센
ko.lifeSummary: Baron Walter I von Eschenbach(이)가 대략 1150년 스위스 루즈른 슈바치에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Walter I. von Eschenbach(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Adelheid von Geroldseck(은)는 37세였다. 그는 Adelheid von Schwarzenberg(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1187년 6월 1일 스위스 즈u리치 즈u리치 아폴터에서 38세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Baron Walter I von Eschenbach родился около 1150 г. в местности эщэнбач, лузирн, Швейцария, его отцу по имени Walter I. von Eschenbach было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Adelheid von Geroldseck, 37. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери от Adelheid von Schwarzenberg. Он умер 1 июня 1187 г. в местности аффолтирн, зuрич, зuрич, Швейцария в возрасте 38 лет.
